title: Settings
description: Control registration, default context limits, and the allowed model whitelist.
noPermission: This account does not have permission to manage system settings.
systemConfigDescription: These values are now stored in backend system settings and affect public features, cocoon defaults, and request debounce behavior.
coreDescription: These values directly affect Cocoon defaults.
allowRegistrationHint: When enabled, the login page exposes self-service registration backed by invite-code validation.
defaultAutoCompactionHint: New cocoons inherit this switch unless the creator overrides it explicitly.
compactMemoryHelp: This is the maximum number of compacted memories that may be written, not a fixed required count.
modelWhitelistDescription: If no model is selected, there is no restriction. Once selected, only these models can be used to create cocoons.
noModelsAvailable: No models are available yet. Sync provider models first.
runtimeDescription: This page only shows maintenance and prompt capabilities that are actually backed by the backend.
backendCapabilityDescription: These cards only show backend-backed capability signals, not local placeholders.
promptTemplatesDescription: Runtime prompt templates are editable from the dedicated prompt settings page.
unsupportedConfigNote: Mutable system settings and configuration-write APIs are not exposed by the current backend yet.
preferencesDescription: These control the current browser's UI language and theme only, and are not written to backend system settings.
languageDescription: Change the display language for this interface.
themeDescription: Change the appearance theme in this browser.
maintenanceQueueDescription: Queue durable maintenance jobs that the backend actually supports.
artifactCleanupHint: Expired audit artifacts are cleaned up through a durable job, not a synchronous delete API.
maintenanceDescription: Run rollback cleanup immediately if you need to purge expired rollback tails.
